text: ⚡️ 🇷🇺 The Russian Ministry of Defence announced that the May 9th Parade celebrating the 81st anniversary of the Second World War won’t feature any columns of military equipment, citing current operational constraints. Instead the parade will feature foot columns from Russian military branches and education institutions. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇷🇺 俄罗斯国防部宣布，为庆祝第二次世界大战胜利81周年的5月9日阅兵式将不会有任何军事装备方阵，理由是当前的作战限制。相反，阅兵式将由俄罗斯各军种和教育机构的徒步方阵组成。 @wfwitness

text: 🐻 Here's a summary of everything you need to know about the past 24 hours: ➡️ The Victory Day Parade in Moscow has not been canceled ➡️ The UAE announces their withdrawal from OPEC and OPEC+ ➡️ Israel and Ukraine are fighting ➡️ Bangladesh launches first power unit of the Rooppur Nuclear Power Plant — built together with Russia ➡️ The Russian Defense Ministry gives an update on the situation in Mali ➡️ Trump is talking to his imaginary Iranian friends again , and is apparently the King's cousin ➡️ Hungary's prime minister-elect Magyar meets with the mayor of Zakarpattia's Beregovo ➡️ US Navy harasses and boards a ship they suspected to be headed for Iranian ports ➡️ King Charles lobbies for a war with Russia in the US Congress ➡️ State Department to release limited edition ‘America250’ passports with Trump’s face 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🐻 以下是您需要了解的过去24小时内所有事件的摘要： ➡️ 莫斯科胜利日阅兵并未取消 ➡️ 阿联酋宣布退出欧佩克（OPEC）和欧佩克+（OPEC+） ➡️ 以色列和乌克兰正在交战 ➡️ 孟加拉国启动了与俄罗斯共同建造的鲁普尔核电站的首个发电机组 ➡️ 俄罗斯国防部通报了马里的局势 ➡️ 特朗普又在与他想象中的伊朗朋友交谈，显然他还是国王的表亲 ➡️ 匈牙利候任总理马扎尔会见了外喀尔巴阡地区别列戈沃市市长 ➡️ 美国海军骚扰并登上一艘他们怀疑前往伊朗港口的船只 ➡️ 查尔斯国王在美国国会游说与俄罗斯开战 ➡️ 美国国务院将发布印有特朗普头像的“美国250”限量版护照 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ Pentagon Asks Congress to Codify ‘Department of War’ Name, Estimates $52 Million Cost The Pentagon has submitted a legislative proposal requesting Congress to formally rename the Department of Defense as the Department of War. The move, which follows Trump’s September 2025 executive order, is projected to cost approximately $52 million. 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇷🇺 Reuters: A superyacht owned by Russian billionaire Alexey Mordashov was able to transit the blockaded Strait of Hormuz after undergoing maintenance in Dubai. The yacht, called Nord, sailed under a Russian flag and crossed the strait on an approved route in compliance with international maritime law. According to a source close to Mordashov, neither Iran nor the United States objected to the yacht's movement, with Iran considering it a civilian vessel of a friendly country conducting a peaceful transit and has been located near the coast of Oman since Sunday. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇷🇺 路透社：俄罗斯亿万富翁阿列克谢·莫尔达绍夫（Alexey Mordashov）拥有的一艘超级游艇在迪拜完成维护后，成功通过了被封锁的霍尔木兹海峡。这艘名为“Nord”的游艇悬挂俄罗斯国旗，并按照国际海事法规定的批准航线穿越了海峡。据接近莫尔达绍夫的消息人士称，伊朗和美国均未对该游艇的航行提出异议。伊朗将其视为友好国家的民用船只，认为其正在进行和平过境。自周日以来，该游艇一直位于阿曼海岸附近。 @wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel King Charles to President Trump: “Indeed you recently commented, Mr. President, that if it were not for the United States, European countries would be speaking German. Dare I say that if it wasn't for us, you'd be speaking French” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049301193269125503/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 查尔斯国王对特朗普总统说：“确实，总统先生，您最近评论说，如果不是因为美国，欧洲国家现在都在说德语。我敢说，如果不是因为我们，您现在说的就是法语了” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049301193269125503/video/1 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇬🇧 King Charles III joking some more: You recently commented, Mr. President, that if it were not for the United States, European countries would be speaking German. Dare I say that if it wasn't for us, you'd be speaking French @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇬🇧 🇺🇦 King Charles III on Ukraine and NATO: American leadership helped rebuild a shattered continent, playing a decisive role as a defender of freedom in Europe . We and I shall never forget that, not least as freedom is again under attack following Russia's invasion of Ukraine. Today, our partnerships in NATO deepen our technological and military cooperation and ensure that together we can meet the challenges of an increasingly complex and contested world. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇬🇧 查尔斯三世国王又开玩笑道：总统先生，您最近评论说，如果不是美国，欧洲国家现在都在说德语。我敢说，如果不是我们，您现在说的就是法语了 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇬🇧 🇺🇦 查尔斯三世国王谈乌克兰和北约：美国的领导力帮助重建了一个破碎的大陆，作为欧洲自由的捍卫者发挥了决定性作用。我们和我永远不会忘记这一点，尤其是在俄罗斯入侵乌克兰后，自由再次受到攻击的情况下。今天，我们在北约的伙伴关系加深了我们的技术和军事合作，并确保我们能够共同应对日益复杂和充满竞争的世界带来的挑战。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇬🇧 U.S. President Trump on UK-U.S. relationship: Ours is a treasured friendship, an eternal bond, and a true story of extraordinary heroism and skill... History has known no more powerful force than the combination of American Patriotism and British Pride.…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇬🇧 King Charles III joking some more: You recently commented, Mr. President, that if it were not for the United States, European countries would be speaking German. Dare I say that if it wasn't for us, you'd be speaking French @wfwitness

I'm sorry to say that we British of course made our own small attempt at real estate redevelopment of the White House in 1814. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇬🇧 U.S. President Trump on UK-U.S. relationship: Ours is a treasured friendship, an eternal bond, and a true story of extraordinary heroism and skill... History has known no more powerful force than the combination of American Patriotism and British Pride. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇬🇧 查尔斯三世国王在白宫开玩笑说：我不禁注意到东翼的重新调整。我很遗憾地说，我们英国人当然在1814年对白宫进行过我们自己小规模的房地产重建尝试。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇬🇧 美国总统特朗普谈英美关系：我们之间是珍贵的友谊、永恒的纽带，是一个关于非凡英雄主义和技巧的真实故事……历史上没有任何力量比美国爱国主义与英国骄傲的结合更强大。@wfwitness

text: OSINTdefender According to the Wall Street Journal, citing U.S. officials, U.S. President Donald J. Trump has told his aids to prepare for an extended U.S. blockade of the Strait of Hormuz. Per the report, President Trump sees pulling out of the conflict or resuming combat operations against Iran as far more risky than continuing to blockade vessels traveling to and from Iranian ports. This news follows reporting that the intelligence community was given direction to assess the risk of declaring a unilateral victory and pulling back from the conflict. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 据《华尔街日报》援引美国官员的话称，美国总统唐纳德·J·特朗普已指示其助手为美国对霍尔木兹海峡的长期封锁做好准备。据报道，特朗普总统认为，退出冲突或恢复对伊朗的作战行动，比继续封锁往返伊朗港口的船只风险要大得多。此前有报道称，情报界已接到指示，评估宣布单方面胜利并从冲突中撤出的风险。推文

text: The Spectator Index President Trump is comfortable with an indefinite blockade of Iranian ports, according to Wall Street Journal report. tweet

text: WarMonitor RT @briana_reilly : The Pentagon is asking Congress to formally change DOD’s name to the Department of War. The push - which DOD estimates has cost ~$52 million - would require 7,600 changes to law, per a legislative proposal sent to the Hill this month. https://ogc.osd.mil/Portals/99/OLC%20Proposals/FY%202027/13Apr2026Proposals.pdf?ver=AeAXavwjNx7T4P1R3fWHSA%3d%3d H/t @TonyBertuca Pentagon seeks to codify 'Department of War' as renaming costs near $50M http://ow.ly/yT5I106xOqY - Inside Defense tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 转推 @briana_reilly：五角大楼正要求国会正式将国防部（DOD）更名为战争部。根据本月提交给国会的一项立法提案，此举（国防部估计耗资约5200万美元）将需要对法律进行7600处修改。https://ogc.osd.mil/Portals/99/OLC%20Proposals/FY%202027/13Apr2026Proposals.pdf?ver=AeAXavwjNx7T4P1R3fWHSA%3d%3d 感谢 @TonyBertuca 五角大楼寻求将“战争部”编纂入法，更名成本接近5000万美元 http://ow.ly/yT5I106xOqY - Inside Defense 推文

text: Open Source Intel Treasury Secretary Bessent: "Kharg Island, Iran’s primary oil export terminal, is soon nearing storage capacity, which will force the regime to reduce oil production, resulting in an additional approximately $170 million per day in lost revenue, and causing permanent damage to Iran’s oil infrastructure." tweet

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇬🇧 U.S. President Trump speaking at a state dinner with King Charles III and Queen Camilla: The Declaration of Independence was a miracle for the ages that sparked a far-reaching Revolution in self-government and human freedom. But even though the political bonds between the United States and Great Britain were dissolved forever, they thought, on July 4th, 1776, the more powerful strands of memory, culture, and identity proved unbreakable in any conflict — and grew into a friendship unlike any other on earth. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇬🇧 美国总统特朗普在与查尔斯三世国王和卡米拉王后的国宴上发表讲话：《独立宣言》是跨越时代的奇迹，它引发了一场深远的自治与人类自由革命。尽管人们认为美国与英国之间的政治纽带在1776年7月4日已永远解除，但记忆、文化和身份的更强大纽带在任何冲突中都证明是牢不可破的，并发展成了一种世间独一无二的友谊。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 WSJ: President Donald Trump has instructed aides to prepare for an extended blockade of Iran, aiming to further restrict its oil exports and economic activity to pressure Tehran into concessions on its nuclear program. Officials say the move reflects a decision to continue economic pressure rather than escalate militarily or pursue a near-term deal. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 《华尔街日报》：唐纳德·特朗普总统已指示助手为对伊朗实施长期封锁做好准备，旨在进一步限制其石油出口和经济活动，以迫使德黑兰在核计划上做出让步。官员们表示，此举反映了继续施加经济压力，而非进行军事升级或寻求近期达成协议的决定。 @wfwitness

text: WarMonitor RT @kaitlancollins : Former DOJ official tells me: "This might be the worst case DOJ has filed in my lifetime." Comey indicted again after the last case was dismissed by a federal judge who found that the interim US Attorney was improperly appointed. https://www.cnn.com/2026/04/28/politics/justice-department-indicts-ex-fbi-director-james-comey-again - Kaitlan Collins tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 转发 @kaitlancollins : 前司法部官员告诉我：“这可能是我有生以来司法部提起的最糟糕的案件。” 在上一案被联邦法官以临时美国检察官任命不当为由驳回后，科米再次被起诉。 https://www.cnn.com/2026/04/28/politics/justice-department-indicts-ex-fbi-director-james-comey-again - Kaitlan Collins 推文

text: Open Source Intel U.S. Central Command (CENTCOM): "U.S. Army Soldiers conduct pre-flight checks on UH-60 Black Hawk helicopters. The UH-60 is the workhorse of the Army, logging millions of flight hours and capable of both transporting troops and sling loading cargo." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049287910491361383/photo/1 tweet

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. Treasury Secretary Bessent reports that the U.S. has targeted Iran's shadow banking infrastructure, access to crypto currencies, shadow fleet, and weapons procurement networks as part of the ongoing Economic Fury. He assess that oil storage and export facilities on Kharg Island will soon be reaching storage capacity, forcing Iran to reduce oil production. This will result in Iran losing $170 million a day in revenues. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国财政部长贝森特报告称，作为“经济愤怒”行动的一部分，美国已针对伊朗的影子银行基础设施、加密货币访问权限、影子船队以及武器采购网络进行了打击。他评估认为，哈尔克岛上的石油储存和出口设施很快将达到储存容量上限，迫使伊朗减少石油产量。这将导致伊朗每天损失 1.7 亿美元的收入。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 NYT: The U.S. military has significantly increased attacks on suspected drug-trafficking boats in the Caribbean Sea and eastern Pacific this month, with a the lastest strike on Sunday bringing the total number of strikes to 54 since the campaign started in September. The military has quietly expanded the use of fixed-wing attack aircraft and MQ-9 Reaper drones operating from bases in El Salvador and Puerto Rico, allowing a faster tempo of strikes. One official said suspected smuggling boats previously had around a 50 percent chance of evading interception, but that figure has now reportedly fallen to 25 percent. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 《纽约时报》：本月，美国军方大幅增加了对加勒比海和东太平洋疑似贩毒船只的打击力度，周日的最新一次打击使自9月行动开始以来的总打击次数达到54次。军方已悄然扩大了从萨尔瓦多和波多黎各基地起飞的固定翼攻击机和MQ-9“死神”无人机的使用，从而加快了打击节奏。一位官员表示，疑似走私船只此前约有50%的几率躲避拦截，但据报道，这一数字现已降至25%。@wfwitness

text: Disclose.tv NEW - OxyContin maker Purdue Pharma set to be dissolved, and replaced, by the week’s end, after a federal judge delivered a criminal sentence to resolve a U.S. DOJ investigation — AP tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 最新消息 - 奥施康定制造商普渡制药公司将在本周末前解散并被取代，此前一位联邦法官下达了刑事判决，以解决美国司法部的调查 — 美联社推文

text: Open Source Intel How it’s supposed to go: President Trump is scheduled to meet Xi Jinping in Beijing on May 14 to May 15. Operation Economic Fury will be at full throttle. That is when we should start seeing the early real effects on the regime’s pockets. After the Trump Xi meeting, Operation Epic Fury could resume again. If the IRGC decides to do something reckless between now and then, the summit could be canceled and Epic Fury resumes. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 事情本该如此：特朗普总统计划于5月14日至5月15日在北京会见习近平。届时“经济愤怒行动”将全速推进。那时我们应该开始看到对该政权财政的初步实际影响。在特朗普与习近平会晤后，“史诗愤怒行动”可能会再次恢复。如果伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队在此期间决定采取鲁莽行动，峰会可能会被取消，“史诗愤怒行动”将随之恢复。推文

text: WarMonitor RT @BrendanKeefe : Son & I went to a national park in January & asked to buy the $80 annual pass. Rangers said they were ordered to throw out all the hard passes b/c they didn't have Trump's photo on them (yet). Had to buy online & rangers printed a temp pass. This came in the mail a month later. https://twitter.com/BrendanKeefe/status/2049199099979682014/photo/1 SCOOP — The State Department is unveiling a limited-edition passport redesign for America250 featuring images of Donald Trump, the Declaration of Independence and the founding fathers. Take a look: https://twitter.com/Katelyn_Caralle/status/2049170808300298629/photo/1 - Katelyn Caralle tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 转推 @BrendanKeefe ：一月份我和儿子去了一个国家公园，想买80美元的年度通行证。护林员说他们接到命令扔掉所有硬质通行证，因为上面（还没）印有特朗普的照片。不得不在线购买，护林员打印了一张临时通行证。这张通行证一个月后寄到了。https://twitter.com/BrendanKeefe/status/2049199099979682014/photo/1 独家新闻 — 美国国务院正在发布一款限量版美国250周年纪念护照重新设计方案，上面印有唐纳德·特朗普、独立宣言和开国元勋的图像。请看：https://twitter.com/Katelyn_Caralle/status/2049170808300298629/photo/1 - Katelyn Caralle 推文

text: WarMonitor RT @kylegriffin1 : BREAKING: Trump's FCC chief, Brendan Carr, has just ordered a review of all station licenses owned by ABC — an extraordinary move to pressure a TV network whose programming has angered Trump. The news comes after both Donald and Melania called for the firing of Jimmy Kimmel. tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 转推 @kylegriffin1 ：突发新闻：特朗普的联邦通信委员会主席布伦丹·卡尔刚刚下令审查美国广播公司（ABC）拥有的所有电台执照 — 这是一项非同寻常的举措，旨在向一家因节目内容激怒特朗普的电视网施压。此前，唐纳德和梅拉尼娅都曾呼吁解雇吉米·坎摩尔。推文

text: WarMonitor U.S. spy agencies were asked to assess how Iran would react if Trump declared victory and backed down. Early assessments found Tehran would likely see a drawdown as an Iranian victory. (Reuters) https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2049277483930062859/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 美国情报机构被要求评估如果特朗普宣布胜利并退让，伊朗将如何反应。初步评估发现，德黑兰很可能会将此视为伊朗的胜利。（路透社）https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2049277483930062859/photo/1 推文

text: A bank robber, a bishop on an oil field, and a government-in-exile offering the CIA free operations in exchange for independence. This is not a religious conflict, this is a resource war with a gospel soundtrack. Read our latest in the original DDGeopolitics investigative series: THE "SPIES" WHO CRIED GENOCIDE: PART 4 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 一个银行劫匪，一个在油田的主教，以及一个以独立为交换条件向中央情报局提供免费行动的流亡政府。这不是一场宗教冲突，这是一场伴随着福音配乐的资源战争。阅读我们原创DDGeopolitics调查系列的最新文章：高喊种族灭绝的“间谍”：第四部分 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: OSINTdefender U.S. President Donald J. Trump and First Lady Melania Trump have now welcomed the UK’s King Charles III and Queen Camilla to the White House for the White House State Dinner. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2049274027768709580/video/1 tweet

text: WarMonitor Fetterman was the only Democrat to side with Republicans, while Susan Collins and Rand Paul were the only Republicans to break ranks. They own whatever happens next. NEW: The U.S. Senate voted 51–47 to reject a resolution that would’ve blocked Trump from launching a military strike on Cuba without congressional approval. Trump has repeatedly said in recent months that “Cuba is next” after Venezuela and Iran. https://twitter.com/RpsAgainstTrump/status/2049268700667101383/photo/1 - Republicans against Trump tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 费特曼是唯一支持共和党人的民主党人，而苏珊·柯林斯和兰德·保罗是仅有的两位打破党派立场的共和党人。接下来发生的一切都由他们负责。最新消息：美国参议院以 51 票对 47 票否决了一项决议，该决议本可以阻止特朗普在未经国会批准的情况下对古巴发动军事打击。特朗普近几个月来多次表示，继委内瑞拉和伊朗之后，“下一个就是古巴”。https://twitter.com/RpsAgainstTrump/status/2049268700667101383/photo/1 - 反对特朗普的共和党人推文

text: ⚡️ 🇨🇦 🇺🇸 Canadian Defence Minister McGuinty explains why Canada purchase of 88 F-35s is still under review. Reporter: "Why is the m 35 contract still under review? Like, it's been under review for months. What's the holdup on this?” McGuinty: “It's a really important analysis that we're conducting. It's one of the largest procurements in Canadian history. Obviously, it speaks to industrial benefits. It speaks to buy Canadian provisions. Speaks to jobs. It speaks to investment. It speaks to subcontracting. It speaks to all kinds of issues that are important for us." @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇨🇦 🇺🇸 加拿大国防部长麦金蒂解释了为何加拿大购买 88 架 F-35 战机的计划仍在审查中。记者：“为什么 F-35 合同仍在审查中？这已经审查好几个月了。到底在拖延什么？”麦金蒂：“我们正在进行非常重要的分析。这是加拿大历史上最大的采购项目之一。显然，这涉及工业利益。涉及购买加拿大产品的条款。涉及就业。涉及投资。涉及分包。涉及我们关心的各种问题。”@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇬🇧 U.S. President Trump welcomes British King Charles III and Queen Camilla to the White House. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇬🇧 The U.S. Space Force took part in the honor guard of an official state visit for the first time, participating in ceremonies for King Charles III. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇬🇧 美国总统特朗普在白宫欢迎英国国王查尔斯三世和卡米拉王后。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇬🇧 美国太空军首次参与国事访问的仪仗队，参加了查尔斯三世国王的仪式。@wfwitness
